---
name: Architecture decision
about: Propose or record an architecture / platform decision (ADR-lite)
title: "[ADR] "
labels: architecture
assignees: ""
---

## Context

What forces or constraints make this decision necessary now?

## Decision

What do you propose we decide?

## Options considered

1. Option A — pros / cons  
2. Option B — pros / cons  
3. …

## Consequences

What becomes easier or harder? Any licensing, privacy, or education/showcase impact?

## Alignment checks

- [ ] Distinguishes current state from future vision  
- [ ] Avoids premature platformization  
- [ ] Local-first / optional-auth framing respected (if relevant)  
- [ ] MIT educational showcase boundary respected  
- [ ] SleepCheck wellness positioning respected (if relevant)  
- [ ] No private commercial strategy introduced into this public repo  

## Follow-up

- Docs to update (paths):  
- Decision log entry needed? Yes / No
